name: Sai Charan S
title: Software Developer
tagline: Python Backend Developer with 3.4 years of experience specializing in Python, Django, and AWS. I build scalable REST APIs, asynchronous systems with Celery, and cloud-native backend services powering real-world applications.
summary: I'm a Python Backend Developer with 3.4 years of experience building production-grade applications using Python, Django, Django REST Framework, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Docker, AWS, Celery, Redis, and REST APIs. I have worked on healthcare, education, and analytics platforms, developing scalable backend services, payment integrations, media pipelines, and cloud deployments. I enjoy designing clean APIs, optimizing database queries, and solving real-world backend problems.
